# Template fixtures

Vendored ADL 1.4 **operational template** (`.opt`) files for `openehr/template/` unit tests and the `cmd/examples/opt-parse` worked example.

## Inventory

| File | Template id | Root archetype | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `vital_signs.opt` | `vital_signs` | `openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.blood_pressure.v2` (and others) | Multi-archetype slot-fills. Exercises `C_ARCHETYPE_ROOT`, nested `C_SINGLE_ATTRIBUTE` / `C_MULTIPLE_ATTRIBUTE`, occurrences, primitive constraints (`C_CODE_PHRASE`, `C_DV_QUANTITY`). |
| `clinical_note.opt` | `clinical_note` | `openEHR-EHR-COMPOSITION.encounter.v1` | Mixed section/observation tree typical of free-text clinical notes. |

Both OPTs were generated by Ocean Template Designer (Alpha 2.5.1108) and ship with the canonical openEHR namespace
`xmlns="http://schemas.openehr.org/v1"`.

## Provenance

Sourced from an internal Cadasto benchmark fixture set (locally cloned sibling repository under `/src/cadasto/`). The files are unmodified; the in-repo copies exist so `make test` does not depend on a sibling clone (REQ-082 — probe runnability).

## Refresh

If the source fixtures change shape, copy the new files in and run:

```bash
go test ./openehr/template/...
```

Update this README if the inventory changes (filenames, template ids, archetype roots, or constraint coverage).

## License

These templates are sample artefacts used solely for SDK conformance and parser testing. They contain no patient data.
